_note: MHC-I binding of EWSR1::NR4A3 junction-spanning peptides (MHCflurry-2.0). %rank<=0.5 strong, <=2 weak (netMHC convention).

_breakpoint_model.caveat: Exact junction residue is transcript/patient specific; this models the canonical fusion. Re-run with a sequenced breakpoint to get patient-specific epitopes.
